title: Uom
$comment: A9 SDK public I/O schema: public-safe unit-of-measure reference contract only. UOM is an optional reference; matching never requires UOM (FD-10 / AC-M1). This schema carries public reference fields only and deliberately contains no unit-conversion engine, conversion factors, or formulas. It does not close DD-3 and does not declare B2 complete, and must never encode matching logic/weights, trust weights/tiers, scoring formulas, learning internals, or any private engine/Core internals.
